pr.title: PR #137 — Execution Plan Framework v1
pr.description:
## Summary

Adds the **execution-plan layer** — the seventh layer of the execution roadmap, on top of Execution Readiness. Where Readiness answers *can execution proceed?*, this layer represents *what execution would do*: a deterministic, append-only set of typed execution plans (capability/readiness/chain) composed of ordered steps. Declarative/observational only — no execution, scheduling, orchestration, optimization, or worker assignment (consumes ExecutionReadiness + CapabilityChain + CapabilityKnowledgeGraph read-only).

Mirrors the established framework pattern (validation → uppercase normalization → deterministic sort/dedup → aggregation → evidence bundle + pass/fail gate), so the diff is mostly analogous to `execution_readiness.py`.

**Model**
```
ExecutionPlan       = plan_id, capability_id, readiness_id, chain_id,
                      plan_type, status, steps[], summary, created_at,
                      schema_version, raw_payload
ExecutionPlanStep   = step_id, plan_id, order_index, step_name, summary, created_at
ExecutionPlanReport = report_id, plan_count, step_count, status_counts,
                      plan_type_counts, blocked_count, failed_count,
                      duplicate_plan_count, created_at
plan_type ∈ IMPLEMENTATION|VALIDATION|REPAIR|REVIEW|REPORTING|INVESTIGATION|CUSTOM
status    ∈ CREATED|READY|BLOCKED|COMPLETED|FAILED
```

**Determinism**
- plan sort key = `(capability_id, readiness_id, chain_id, plan_type, status, plan_id)`
- step sort key = `(order_index, step_name, step_id)`
- duplicate plan = case-insensitive `(capability_id, readiness_id, chain_id, plan_type)`, keep first, count the rest

**Pass/Fail**
```
passed = plan_count > 0 and blocked_count == 0 and failed_count == 0   # empty → fail
```

**CLI** (`execution-plan-create / execution-plans / execution-plan-show / execution-plan-export`, JSON/Markdown/CSV) + rich renderer; registered in `command_registry.py` (READ_ONLY, SAFE, POETRY_ENV). Evidence bundle under `artifacts/execution_plan/<run_id>/`: `execution_plan_request.json`, `execution_plan_result.json`, `execution_plan_summary.md`, `pass_fail.json` (+ `report.json`).

## Validation
- `poetry run pytest -q` → **4686 passed, 1 skipped** (+53; baseline 4633 at #136)
- `poetry run ruff check src/ tests/` → **0 errors**
- New tests: `tests/test_execution_plan.py` (53) — models/round-trip, create/determinism, step ordering, normalization, validation, duplicate detection, blocked/failed detection, pass/fail gates, append-only, retrieval/exports, path safety

## What did not change
- No execution/orchestration/scheduling/optimization/worker-assignment (per non-goals); upstream layers consumed read-only.
- Revit 2024 baseline unaffected. No architecture changes.


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
